name: Dark the Dead
short_description: Dark the Dead is an exciting game where you take on the role of a hidden wanderer who goes to meet an elder to receive a new task. The elder's magic coins were stolen, and your main goal is to return them.
detailed_description:
Dark the Dead is an exciting game where you take on the role of a hidden wanderer who goes to meet an elder to receive a new task. The elder's magic coins were stolen, and your main goal is to return them. Travel through dark and dangerous lands, where mysterious obstacles, ancient secrets and battles with enemies await you. Explore forgotten lands to find magical coins and bring them back.

It is a 2D platformer that combines puzzle and platforming elements. In this game you will find exciting levels filled with interesting challenges and secrets.

Will you be able to return the stolen magic coins and overcome all the difficulties in your way?
